nodes.label: AI for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: AI as risk of miscommunication or loss of personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI to help me ensure the tone of the message is right for the audience

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficiently creative or context-aware
nodes.grounding_span: I also use AI as a creative tool to help me come up with ideas for engaging program and events

nodes.label: AI as task delegator for complete tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as requiring ongoing collaboration for open-ended tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will mostly delegate complete tasks for AI to handle fully and independently

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as one-shot tool without back-and-forth refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate with AI more, having back and forth conversation about ideas

nodes.label: Appropriateness of AI use in personal and evaluative contexts
nodes.label_negative: Inappropriateness of AI use in personal and evaluative contexts
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel that's appropriate. For a reference of that magnitude, I prefer that it be written by me

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to skill preservation and personal writing ability
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to rely on AI as a timesaver, especially with my written communication, and I worry there may be a point that I rely too heavily on AI

nodes.label: AI as emotional support in difficult situations
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate for nuanced human relations
nodes.grounding_span: I admittedly shared my shock and frustration with AI before finally asking it to help me brainstorm ways to speak with my supervisor

nodes.label: AI as tool for cultural sensitivity and inclusivity
nodes.label_negative: AI use as accepted and openly discussed
nodes.grounding_span: AI is still a pretty taboo topic, especially when it comes to student use

nodes.label: Effective professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I want to make sure my intentions are as clear as possible

nodes.label: Creative and engaging program development
nodes.grounding_span: come up with ideas for engaging program and events

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel that's appropriate. For a reference of that magnitude, I prefer that it be written by me

nodes.label: Professional writing skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I worry there may be a point that I rely too heavily on AI and might lose my ability to think through and complete written tasks for myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in work
nodes.grounding_span: the amount of work on my plate requires that I consider how to best use my time

nodes.label: Supportive and confident handling of sensitive interpersonal situations
nodes.grounding_span: AI helped me figure out how to best share the information with confidence and care

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for tone-check
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me do that

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I also use AI as a creative tool to help me come up with ideas

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as reference tool
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel that's appropriate

nodes.label: Frustration with student AI misuse
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel that it would be appropriate to use AI to help generate feedback

nodes.label: Concern about skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: I worry there may be a point that I rely too heavily on AI and might lose my ability to think through and complete written tasks for myself

nodes.label: Gratitude for AI as a guide
nodes.grounding_span: I credit AI with helping me figure out how to best share the information with confidence and care

nodes.label: Concern about AI's intellectual harm without education
nodes.grounding_span: AI is still a pretty taboo topic

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I see myself exploring other ways to use AI to save time, expanding this beyond written communication

nodes.label: Context-rich prompting — provides detailed background and goals
nodes.grounding_span: I like to give it as much context as possible (explaining the background of the situation, who I'm in contact with, and the goal of the communication)

nodes.label: Task-dependent collaboration style
nodes.grounding_span: For work like email drafting, I will mostly delegate complete tasks for AI to handle fully and independently... when I'm brainstorming ideas for a program or event, I tend to collaborate with AI more
